description: CompositionCharcoal black pants made of 100% certified organic cotton with a wash treatment, zippered fly, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back and brand tab attached to the back belt loop areaFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water on gentle or delicate cycle with mild detergentsTumble dry normal on medium heatDo not bleach, fabric conditioner or starchWarm iron when neededDo not iron trim or decoration or dry cleanMade of organic cotton and in an attractive color, these pants from timberland are perfect for everyday wear. The fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day and the pre-washed look gives it a rugged appearance. Pair it with polo neck t-shirts or shirts and casual slip-ons for a really cool look.This pant has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner with the aim to reduce Carbon Footprint.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 40"Height: 6', Waist: 32"
